title: 2026-07-21｜Daily English

reviewQuiz.zh: 避免回调读取陈旧闭包
reviewQuiz.answer: avoid a stale closure in the callback

reviewQuiz.zh: 在数据加载时显示骨架屏
reviewQuiz.answer: display a skeleton screen while the data is loading

words.meaning: 拒付；持卡人要求银行撤销一笔银行卡交易
words.sentence: The support team needs clear evidence to handle a chargeback.

words.meaning: 价格明细；总价中各项费用的拆分说明
words.sentence: Show a complete price breakdown before the user confirms the order.

words.meaning: 服务补救；在服务失败后恢复体验和信任的处理过程
words.sentence: A clear service recovery plan can reduce complaints after a cancellation.

words.meaning: 布局偏移；页面元素在加载过程中意外移动
words.sentence: Reserve image space to prevent layout shift while the page is loading.

words.meaning: 焦点陷阱；将键盘焦点限制在弹窗等指定区域内
words.sentence: Implement a focus trap so keyboard users cannot tab behind the modal.

words.meaning: 内存泄漏；不再需要的对象仍被引用而无法释放
words.sentence: Remove unused event listeners to prevent a memory leak.

words.meaning: 范围蔓延；需求在未同步调整资源或排期时不断扩大
words.sentence: Document every new request to avoid scope creep during development.

words.meaning: 贯彻到底；把承诺的事项持续推进并完成
words.sentence: Clear ownership and strong follow-through are needed after the meeting.

words.meaning: 自行中转；旅客需自行提取行李并重新办理下一段航班
words.sentence: Leave enough time between flights when the itinerary includes a self-transfer.

words.meaning: 免签安排；符合条件的旅客无需提前申请普通签证
words.sentence: Check the visa waiver rules before booking an international trip.

focus: 动态复习：优先区分 verification / reversal / compliance，分别对应信息核验、交易冲正和规则合规。
技术强化：用 event propagation / stale closure / skeleton screen 描述事件、状态和加载体验，再补充今天的 layout shift / focus trap / memory leak。
沟通表达：把 context / commitment 与 scope creep / follow-through 串成一次项目同步，先说明背景，再确认范围、承诺和后续执行。
旅行复习：将 baggage allowance / currency exchange / self-transfer / visa waiver 组成出发前检查清单。
